Prediction: No

The current visit record indicates that the patient has chronic hepatitis C and alcoholic cirrhosis of the liver, with a complex medication regimen primarily focused on managing these conditions. There is no explicit mention of any lipid disorders such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any related lipid abnormalities. The medications listed do not include any that are specifically aimed at managing lipid levels, nor is there any indication of ongoing management or diagnosis of a lipid metabolism disorder. Therefore, based on the information provided, there is insufficient evidence to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
